title: jasione corymbosa subsp. cornuta
intro: Jasione corymbosa subsp. cornuta is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family, characterized by its tall stems and clusters of blue or white flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Jasione corymbosa subsp. cornuta include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves that are applied topically to the affected areas.
